overview: SB 03 RECLINING CHAIR SB 03 Reclining chair has been designed with soft lines and rounded edges, without sharp edges and cutting surfaces to avoid any problem with cuts and scratches. Strong Construction 180 kg safety working capacity. Steel construction easy open and close Easy to recline Fabric or leatherette upholstered surface Fabric or leatherette upholstered armrests Antibacterial surface to enhance hygiene IV Pole (Optional) Pushing Handle (Optional)
